name: Session Stack Review
description: Review a PersonaKit session and its defining artifacts with findings, SWOT, deliverable-confidence scoring, red-pen recommendations, and a rescored summary.

notes: Use PersonaKit MCP as the primary source of truth: resolve the session reference first, then trace and explain the stack before scoring confidence.
Treat `targetSessionRef` as either a canonical session id or a session-file path and normalize it before review output is written.
Prioritize findings over summary language; if the stack is weak, say so plainly.
Use file-by-file SWOT and fixed risk-dimension scoring instead of one blended overall verdict alone.
Red-pen recommendations should prefer the smallest contract hardening changes that materially improve reliability.
If PersonaKit MCP is unavailable or missing required review surfaces, fail closed, write an MCP-gap artifact, and recommend MCP improvement instead of silently falling back to manual freehand review.
Do not silently implement fixes during the review pass unless AJ explicitly requested a follow-up change.
